description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build-riderlink that runs on push to specific branches (net201, net202) excluding README.md changes and on pull requests to those branches. Use a matrix job strategy to build on Windows Latest with a custom environment and command separator. The job checks out the repository, sets up a Gradle cache, generates models, cleans files, builds a plugin, and uploads the built plugin as an artifact if the build is successful and the event is a commit.
